item.title: Can TikTok Make You Think You Have ADHD?
item.description: Social media can increase awareness of ADHD, but it can also lead to misunderstandings. This explores the difference between relatable online content, common ADHD traits, and the importance of a thorough professional evaluation.

media:content.media:title: Can TikTok Make You Think You Have ADHD?
media:content.media:description: Social media can increase awareness of ADHD, but it can also lead to misunderstandings. This explores the difference between relatable online content, common ADHD traits, and the importance of a thorough professional evaluation.

item.title: Simple task, full side quest
item.description: If one tiny thing turned into 12 tabs, you’re in the right place.

media:content.media:title: Simple task, full side quest
media:content.media:description: If one tiny thing turned into 12 tabs, you’re in the right place.

item.title: When one text feels like a big deal
item.description: A relatable look at how one message can feel bigger than it seems, with a light, thoughtful take on ADHD experiences.

media:content.media:title: When one text feels like a big deal
media:content.media:description: A relatable look at how one message can feel bigger than it seems, with a light, thoughtful take on ADHD experiences.

item.title: Hormones and ADHD: a familiar pattern
item.description: A look at how ADHD and perimenopause can overlap, and why the pattern may feel familiar once you see it this way.

media:content.media:title: Hormones and ADHD: a familiar pattern
media:content.media:description: A look at how ADHD and perimenopause can overlap, and why the pattern may feel familiar once you see it this way.

item.title: The ADHD Productivity Hack That Works
item.description: A simple productivity strategy designed to help reduce overwhelm, improve task initiation, and make it easier to stay focused when managing ADHD.

media:content.media:title: The ADHD Productivity Hack That Works
media:content.media:description: A simple productivity strategy designed to help reduce overwhelm, improve task initiation, and make it easier to stay focused when managing ADHD.

item.title: Why Many Women Missed ADHD Signs
item.description: A look at why ADHD in women has often gone unrecognized and how awareness is changing.

media:content.media:title: Why Many Women Missed ADHD Signs
media:content.media:description: A look at why ADHD in women has often gone unrecognized and how awareness is changing.

item.title: Need subtitles? A look at real-time processing
item.description: A brief look at how some brains translate speech in real time, which can feel awkward but is not rude.

media:content.media:title: Need subtitles? A look at real-time processing
media:content.media:description: A brief look at how some brains translate speech in real time, which can feel awkward but is not rude.

item.title: A closer look at ADHD self-diagnosis
item.description: A doctor explains why ADHD self-diagnosis on TikTok deserves a closer look.

media:content.media:title: A closer look at ADHD self-diagnosis
media:content.media:description: A doctor explains why ADHD self-diagnosis on TikTok deserves a closer look.

item.title: Missing the First Layer
item.description: That moment when everyone seems to understand what's happening, but your brain is still trying to catch up. A relatable look at auditory processing and information overload that many people with ADHD experience.

media:content.media:title: Missing the First Layer
media:content.media:description: That moment when everyone seems to understand what's happening, but your brain is still trying to catch up. A relatable look at auditory processing and information overload that many people with ADHD experience.

item.title: Why your body keeps reaching for this
item.description: A look at why your body may keep reaching for this, with a focus on ADHD and bilateral stimulation.

media:content.media:title: Why your body keeps reaching for this
media:content.media:description: A look at why your body may keep reaching for this, with a focus on ADHD and bilateral stimulation.

item.title: Parenting with ADHD
item.description: Parenting while managing ADHD can bring extra challenges with focus, emotional regulation, and daily routines. A look at the realities of balancing caregiving with an ADHD brain.

media:content.media:title: Parenting with ADHD
media:content.media:description: Parenting while managing ADHD can bring extra challenges with focus, emotional regulation, and daily routines. A look at the realities of balancing caregiving with an ADHD brain.

item.title: A simple analogy for emotional sensitivity
item.description: A simple analogy can help you understand emotional sensitivity, your reactions, and your emotions with more clarity and self-awareness.

media:content.media:title: A simple analogy for emotional sensitivity
media:content.media:description: A simple analogy can help you understand emotional sensitivity, your reactions, and your emotions with more clarity and self-awareness.
